title: Beef Empanadas
description: A classic Argentinian dish, these beef empanadas are crispy on the outside and savory on the inside.
instructions: In a large bowl, combine beef, salt, and pepper. Mix well.
Roll out the empanada dough to a thickness of 1/8 inch.
Cut out circles of dough using a cookie cutter or the rim of a glass.
Place a tablespoon of the beef mixture in the center of each dough circle.
Fold the dough in half to form a half-circle and press the edges together to seal the empanada.
Brush the tops of the empanadas with egg and cut a few slits in the top to allow steam to escape.
Place the empanadas on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and bake for 20-25 minutes, or until golden brown.
